Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, and seasonal inventory highlights.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual catalog lookups.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email—subject line, body copy, CTAs, and product highlights—tailored to the R1 Concepts brand voice.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-optimized email content daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot via the Marketing Email API and triggers a send to the designated contact lists.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates end-to-end email delivery to segmented audiences, ensuring consistent daily outreach with zero manual send steps.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the Dynamic Friction Company website for current product lines, featured parts, and active promotions.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with real-time inventory and offers, removing the need for manual product research.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email for DFC including subject line, persuasive copy, and product-specific callouts.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, on-brand marketing content every day without creative bottlenecks, driving consistent customer engagement.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email in HubSpot and sends it to the DFC contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Completes the daily email pipeline automatically, ensuring DFC audiences receive timely communications with full tracking.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including ticket details, customer information, and conversation history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all customer issues in real time, ensuring no ticket is missed and giving the AI full context for accurate responses.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (returns, warranty, shipping, product questions) and drafts a context-aware reply for the support team.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and initial response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification tag and attaches the drafted reply as a note for agent review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket intelligence inside HubSpot so the support team has organized, pre-drafted responses ready for one-click approval.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that have been captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all Amazon customer issue data from HubSpot automatically, eliminating the need to manually export or search for submissions.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each submission into a structured Google Sheet with columns for issue type, product, date, and customer details for team analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Creates a living, shareable dashboard of Amazon customer issues that enables trend analysis, quality control insights, and faster resolution tracking.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Identifies high-intent DFC customers browsing R1 products in real time, giving the sales team a critical window to engage warm prospects.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate sales follow-up while customer interest is highest, reducing response time from hours to minutes and increasing close rates.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts, handling product inquiries, order questions, and self-service support interactions.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Once deployed, will provide 24/7 instant customer assistance, reducing support queue volume and improving customer satisfaction scores.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes business directories and local listings daily to find businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automatically builds a fresh pipeline of potential sublet tenants every day without manual prospecting, dramatically expanding outreach volume.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Discovers and verifies email addresses for decision-makers at each identified business using email lookup services.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches the right person at each company, improving response rates and avoiding wasted emails to generic inboxes.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Creates lead contacts in HubSpot and sends personalized warm intro emails about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates the full lead-gen-to-outreach cycle daily, keeping the pipeline full and the sublet listing in front of qualified prospects consistently.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, and ACOS metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes all Amazon advertising data for both brands, eliminating manual report downloads and enabling unified cross-brand performance analysis.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance patterns and generates optimization recommendations for bids, keywords, and budget allocation across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Provides data-driven ad optimization insights that would take an analyst hours to compile, helping reduce wasted ad spend and improve ROAS.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to identify content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across multiple platforms.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide discovery net across the open web, surfacing creators that platform-only searches would miss and broadening the candidate pool significantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles from YouTube and Instagram including follower counts, engagement rates, content themes, and posting frequency.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Provides rich, platform-specific metrics for each discovered creator, enabling informed qualification decisions based on real audience data.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes collected creator data using AI to rank and shortlist the most relevant creators based on keyword alignment and audience fit.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw discovery data into an actionable, prioritized creator list, saving hours of manual vetting and ensuring brand-relevant matches surface first.

Creator Qualifier.action: Receives discovered creator profiles and applies customizable scoring weights across dimensions like engagement, audience size, content relevance, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Delivers objective, repeatable creator scores that remove subjective bias from selection, ensuring partnerships are data-driven and aligned with campaign goals.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a final qualified creator report with tier rankings, score breakdowns, and actionable partnership recommendations based on the weighted analysis.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Provides a ready-to-act shortlist with clear justifications for each creator's ranking, accelerating the decision-to-outreach timeline from days to minutes.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists from shared Drive folders.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes all outreach playbooks and creator data so the agent operates from proven, up-to-date sequences instead of starting from scratch each campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences and contextual prompt engineering.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly tailored, human-sounding emails at scale, saving hours of manual copywriting per campaign while maintaining consistent brand voice.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator's email address from the designated brand account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates delivery of outreach at scale, eliminating manual send-and-track effort and ensuring timely, consistent contact with every qualified creator.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors inbox for incoming creator replies and retrieves full email thread history including previous negotiation conversations.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and provides the AI with complete conversation context for intelligent, continuity-aware replies.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations, negotiation playbooks, and approved rate/terms references from Drive.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real past negotiation outcomes so responses reflect proven tactics and stay within approved budget and terms boundaries.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware reply emails using learned negotiation patterns and the full thread history to advance or close the conversation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles nuanced back-and-forth negotiation autonomously, dramatically reducing response time and freeing the team from repetitive email exchanges.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-crafted negotiation reply back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains seamless, threaded communication with creators so conversations feel natural and continuous without manual intervention.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Reads MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers to generate a formatted weekly DFC load sheet.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates DFC First to Market email copy for new product launches, including product descriptions, key selling points, and monthly recap summaries.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle reporting metrics including lead stages, conversion rates, and email campaign performance data for the reporting period.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects a new weekly R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts video URL, title, description, and transcript data.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls search performance data including impressions, clicks, CTR, and average position for DFC blog pages.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Consolidates a dozen independent manual lookups into a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort across the team each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with live inventory data and flags dead-end parts that have no available source from any supplier or pipeline.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable dashboard, instantly highlighting which orders can be fulfilled and which require customer intervention.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items, with tailored messaging for fulfillable orders versus dead-end parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the need for staff to manually compose individual customer updates, ensuring timely and consistent communication for every open backorder.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes online catalogs from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate supplier websites, capturing every available fitment in a fraction of the time.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and whitespace opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where new product opportunities exist, giving Dino clear data for inventory expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotor fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before committing to new inventory, replacing guesswork with real customer signals collected at scale.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates all scraped data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single source of truth that combines supplier intelligence, internal catalog data, and customer demand — ready for strategic decision-making.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, extracting every text field from headlines, descriptions, and creative overlays.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides comprehensive visibility into all live advertising copy without requiring manual review of each campaign, ad set, and individual ad.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes all extracted ad copy against specified search phrases, identifying exact matches and flagging the precise field and copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims across hundreds of ads in seconds — work that would take a team hours to do manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list showing every ad with a match, including the specific field, full copy text, and campaign context for each finding.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the requestor's inbox, enabling immediate remediation of flagged ads without additional research.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, which runs daily lead-gen for the Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI** for optimizing Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, so the weekly pipeline updates are now fully automated in their latest version. Momentum continues to build — nearly half the pipeline is done and we've got a healthy queue of work ahead!
